changes.value:
**File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/components/field-renderer.tsx:36`

```ts
const editable = field.editor !== "none" && field.type.kind !== "computed";
```

Hardcodes `field.type.kind !== "computed"` to block editing of computed fields, ignoring the YAML-configured `editor` property. Should use `resolveEditor(field) !== "none"` — same fix already applied to entity-inspector.tsx.
